dev.purpose: fast local discovery that is complete enough to prove semantics before promotion
dev.dataPolicy: fixture or disposable local tenant data only

test.purpose: deterministic automated proof of semantic, state, permission, and provider contracts
test.deterministicDataPolicy: fixed fixtures and disposable compose data; no production tenant data

staging.purpose: production-shape rehearsal before V2 cut or release promotion
prodShapeChecks: observability, secret manager, migration, and rollback rehearsal enabled
staging.migrationRehearsal: ordered SQL migrations and data governance evidence are rehearsed against disposable staging tenant data
staging.rollbackRehearsal: rollback/forward-fix path is rehearsed and evidence is retained
staging.sandboxProviderChecks: external integrations use sandbox credentials and production-shaped contracts

prod.purpose: real tenant operation with only current non-destructive health and smoke evidence
observabilityChecks: metrics, logs, traces, alert routing, and incident evidence present before promotion
